combined_text: Harry Morgan, Colonel Potter on âM*A*S*H,â Dies at 96 "Television Harry Morgan, Colonel Potter on ‘M*A*S*H,’ Dies at 96By MICHAEL POLLAK DEC. 7, 2011Harry Morgan, the prolific character actor best known for playing the acerbic but kindly Colonel Potter in the long-running television series “M*A*S*H,” died on Wednesday morning at his home in Los Angeles
